task: Merge agent findings about a prototype reducer.

agents.output:
- The reducer extracts claims from Markdown bullets and plain sentences. Source: design-note.md
- The reducer uses only the Python standard library for the deterministic path.
- The cache setting probably improves speed.

- Claim extraction supports Markdown bullet lines, plain text sentences, and JSON claim lists. Source: agent-beta-report.md
- The deterministic reducer can run without API keys.
- The cache setting probably improves speed.

claims.text: An optional evaluator interface lets teams plug in local or hosted model scorers.
claims.evidence: Architecture note says evaluators are swappable.

claims.text: All agent outputs are always correct.
